name: znetwork_clear_service_provider_list
description: zNetwork::ClearServiceProviderList frees each DirectPlay service-provider info entry, nulls vector slots, and clears the vector range.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ClearServiceProviderList@zNetwork@@YAXXZ at 0x489fa0 still fails: 131 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 141 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.
The native shutdown smoke verifies service-provider entry cleanup and global list disposal through the full shutdown path.
